channel.title: cardjoy blog
channel.description: blog on cardjoy.app, best digital greeting cards for any occasion.

item.title: First Day of CardJoy
item.description: On 4th of July, American's birthday, CardJoy is officially launched.

item.title: Grow Like a Garden
item.description: Success won’t arrive all at once. It will grow like a garden — quietly, from moments that seemed small at the time.

item.title: How do we plan to grow CardJoy
item.description: Build and Grow CardJoy as Family Business

item.title: How to Create a Group Card on Slack
item.description: A quick video walkthrough on making a group card everyone can sign — right inside Slack.

item.title: How to Create a Group Card in CardJoy
item.description: A quick video walkthrough on making a group card everyone can sign.

item.title: How to Invite Others to Write on a Group Card
item.description: A quick video walkthrough on inviting friends and coworkers to add their messages to a group card.

item.title: Bring Local Art to Your Greeting Cards
Recognition Doesn’t Need a Budget Line
item.description: A thread of HR pros arguing about swag and stipends taught us why small, frequent, specific recognition beats big annual programs — and how that shaped CardJoy.
